cards.title: Manipulative Therapy
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • HVLA (High velocity low amplitude): Spinal manipulation
  • Mobilisation (Maitland grades I–IV)
  • MET (Muscle Energy Technique): PIR, RI methods
  • Myofascial Release: Direct vs indirect technique
  • Contraindications: Osteoporosis, malignancy, HIVD
